title: Advancing AI System Design with 3D Photonic Interconnects (OCP / Lightmatter)
preview: OCP presentation showing how 3D co-packaged photonics can replace electrical interconnects to eliminate bandwidth walls in large AI training clusters.
summary: Describes Lightmatter's Passage photonic interconnect technology and its integration into AI system design. Demonstrates how co-packaged optics achieve 100×+ bandwidth density improvement over copper SerDes, enabling all-to-all communication patterns required by MoE and large-scale tensor-parallel training.
datacenter: High strategic relevance. Photonic interconnects directly address the collective communication bottleneck that limits scaling efficiency beyond 1K GPUs. Passage-style products could replace InfiniBand/Ethernet fabrics as the scale-out interconnect of choice.
metrics: Key result signal: bandwidth density (Tb/s/mm²) and energy per bit versus copper SerDes at equivalent reach.
